changeSet.author: ${author_1}
changeSet.comment: Insert dummy API record for testing

ext:insertOne.ext:document: { crid: "CRID-TEST-001", httpMethod: "GET", requestUri: "/user/test", queryParams: "id=123", requestHeaders: "Authorization: Bearer dummy-token", requestBody: "", httpStatusCode: 200, responseBody: "{ \"message\": \"success\" }", targetService: "USER-MICROSERVICE", clientIp: "127.0.0.1", latencyMs: NumberLong(120), environment: "dev", createdAt: new Date(), updatedAt: new Date() }
